summary_en: 70 yen/share (ordinary 50 yen + anniversary special 20 yen) for FY3/26 year-end; total dividend 147.6 billion yen. Annual FY3/26 dividend 120 yen/share (ordinary 100 yen + anniversary special 20 yen), vs. 100 yen/share for FY3/25. Anniversary special commemorates 130th founding year.
title_en: Notice regarding Dividend of Surplus (Dividend Increase on Occasion of 130th Anniversary)
translation_en_brief:
Takigami Steel Construction announced on 15 May 2026 that its Board of Directors resolved to pay a dividend of 70 yen per share for the fiscal year ending 31 March 2026 (record date 31 March 2026). The dividend comprises an ordinary dividend of 50 yen and a special anniversary dividend of 20 yen, with a total payout of 147.6 billion yen. The effective date is scheduled for 29 June 2026 and will be submitted for approval at the 89th Annual General Meeting of Shareholders on 26 June 2026.

Combined with the interim dividend of 50 yen already paid, the total FY3/26 annual dividend will be 120 yen per share (ordinary 100 yen + anniversary special 20 yen), compared to 100 yen per share in the prior fiscal year (FY3/25). The increase is justified as gratitude to shareholders for their continued support through the company's 130th founding anniversary, reached in October 2025. The company states that dividend is a key management policy within shareholder value creation, with the basic principle of maintaining stable, continuous dividend distributions based on business performance and strategic outlook.
